input: The team uses Slack, Zoom, and Notion. Wait, no, Asana not Notion.
ideal: The team uses Slack, Zoom, and Asana.

input: We're flying to Paris, Rome, and Madrid. Actually, Barcelona instead of Madrid.
ideal: We're flying to Paris, Rome, and Barcelona.

input: Buy apples, oranges. Sorry, bananas not oranges.
ideal: Buy apples, bananas.

input: The speakers are Sarah, Mike, Jenna, and Tom. Scratch that, not Tom. Raj.
ideal: The speakers are Sarah, Mike, Jenna, and Raj.

input: I need a hammer, screwdriver, and wrench. Wait, pliers not wrench.
ideal: I need a hammer, screwdriver, and pliers.

input: Dinner is pasta, salad. Actually, soup not salad.
ideal: Dinner is pasta, soup.

input: The interns are Priya, Diego, and Aisha. No wait, not Aisha. Wei.
ideal: The interns are Priya, Diego, and Wei.

input: Pack jeans, t-shirts, and sweaters. Sorry, hoodies not sweaters.
ideal: Pack jeans, t-shirts, and hoodies.

input: The API supports JSON, XML. Actually, YAML not XML.
ideal: The API supports JSON, YAML.

input: Guests include mom, dad, and uncle Joe. Wait, aunt Lisa not uncle Joe.
ideal: Guests include mom, dad, and aunt Lisa.

input: The database runs on MySQL, Redis, and Elasticsearch. Scratch that, not Elasticsearch. ClickHouse.
ideal: The database runs on MySQL, Redis, and ClickHouse.

input: Lunch options are sushi, tacos. I mean, pizza not tacos.
ideal: Lunch options are sushi, pizza.

input: The committee has Chen, Okafor, Patel, and Schmidt. Actually, not Schmidt. Jensen.
ideal: The committee has Chen, Okafor, Patel, and Jensen.

input: Dependencies include lodash, axios, and moment. Sorry, date-fns not moment.
ideal: Dependencies include lodash, axios, and date-fns.

input: The itinerary covers Tokyo, Seoul, and Bangkok. No wait, Singapore not Bangkok.
ideal: The itinerary covers Tokyo, Seoul, and Singapore.

input: Our vendors are Stripe, Twilio, and SendGrid. Actually, not SendGrid. Mailgun.
ideal: Our vendors are Stripe, Twilio, and Mailgun.

input: Bring hiking boots, rain jacket, and wool socks. Sorry, I mean synthetic socks not wool.
ideal: Bring hiking boots, rain jacket, and synthetic socks.

input: The speakers are Nguyen, Kumar, and Fernandez. Scratch that, not Fernandez. O'Brien.
ideal: The speakers are Nguyen, Kumar, and O'Brien.

input: Dinner is chicken, rice, and broccoli. Wait, asparagus not broccoli.
ideal: Dinner is chicken, rice, and asparagus.

input: The cloud regions are us-east, eu-west, and ap-south. Actually, not ap-south. ap-northeast.
ideal: The cloud regions are us-east, eu-west, and ap-northeast.

input: Team leads are Marcus, Priya, and Diego. I mean, not Diego. Yuki.
ideal: Team leads are Marcus, Priya, and Yuki.

input: The playlist needs Beyoncé, Kendrick, and Drake. Sorry, not Drake. SZA.
ideal: The playlist needs Beyoncé, Kendrick, and SZA.

input: Ingredients: flour, sugar, and shortening. No wait, butter not shortening.
ideal: Ingredients: flour, sugar, and butter.

input: The runtimes are Node, Deno, and Bun. Scratch that, not Bun. Go.
ideal: The runtimes are Node, Deno, and Go.

input: Attendees include Wang, Silva, and Oduya. Actually, not Oduya. Petrov.
ideal: Attendees include Wang, Silva, and Petrov.
